payload.label: bed
payload.short_description: dark wooden bed with striped bedding
payload.long_description: Dark stained wooden bed with a tall paneled headboard and matching low frame, neatly made with beige-and-gray horizontal striped sheets and two matching pillows; the bed is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears photographed from close range (about 1.5 m).
